specs.key_requirements: R1 (PEP 695 Generics Support), R2 (Type Parameter Substitution), R4 (Generic Type Constraint Checking)
specs.notes: Core spec for #830 generic syntax. R1-R4 define PEP 695 type parameters (def f[T], class C[T], type Alias[T]). EXTENSION NEEDED: R5 (TypeVarTuple support), R6 (ParamSpec support) for PEP 646/612 as flagged in pre-clarifications Q1 MISSING.

specs.key_requirements: R2 (Compound Statements, with-statement), R3 (Decorators), R4 (PEP 695 Generic Syntax Parsing)
specs.notes: Covers #830 R4 generic function/class def parsing, #847 R3 decorator parsing, #832 with-statement parsing. EXTENSION NEEDED: R2 must explicitly specify parenthesized with form (PEP 617: with (cm1 as a, cm2 as b,):) per pre-clarifications.
Defines type_params field on FnDef, AsyncFnDef, ClassDef, EnumDef, TypeAlias for #830 generic syntax.

specs.key_requirements: R1 (Pratt Parser), R2 (Compound Expression Parsing), R4 (Starred Expression Parsing)
specs.notes: R4 covers #845 starred unpacking in calls/assignments. R2 covers DictLit parsing. EXTENSION NEEDED: R5 to specify DictUnpack entry kind for {**expr} unpacking in #831 (pre-clarifications Q2 confirms parser-level extension required).

specs.key_requirements: R5 (F-String Format Specifier Lowering), R6 (Starred Unpacking Codegen), R7 (draft: Dict unpacking codegen)
specs.notes: R6 handles #845 starred assignment lowering to indexed access (a, *b, c = iterable). R7 draft specifies dict unpacking lowering for #831 {**d1, **d2}.

R1 desugars #847 decorators to function wrapping. R3 desugars #832 with-statement (including parenthesized form). EXTENSION NEEDED: R6 to explicitly specify starred assignment target lowering for #845 (pre-clarifications Q3 references ast_to_hir.rs:1098, but spec lacks explicit requirement).

specs.key_requirements: R1 (Free variable capture), R2 (Cell variable indirection for mutable shared state), R3 (Closure creation at function definition time)
specs.notes: Implements #846 closure mechanism for nonlocal variable capture. R2 provides cell indirection needed for mutable nonlocal bindings.

specs.key_requirements: R1 (Global Statement Processing), R2 (Nonlocal Statement Processing), R3 (Cell Variable Creation), R4 (Free Variable Capture for Nonlocal), R5 (MIR Instruction Extensions)
specs.notes: Complete spec for #846 global/nonlocal semantic analysis. R1-R5 define processing, cell creation, capture, and MIR lowering for global/nonlocal statements.

Covers #848 string literal forms. EXTENSION NEEDED: R4 table incomplete for #848 scope. Currently lists 5 forms (Regular, Triple, F-string, Raw, Byte). Must add: (a) rb/br raw-bytes prefix combo, (b) fr/rf raw-fstring combo, (c) Unicode escapes (\uXXXX, \UXXXXXXXX, \N{name}), (d) hex \xNN and octal \NNN escapes per pre-clarifications Q5.

specs.key_requirements: R1 (Immutable bytes type with sequence operations), R3 (Encoding and decoding)
specs.notes: Implements #848 bytes type. R1 covers b'' literal operations, R3 covers encode/decode for string literal handling.
R5 mb_dict_merge implements #831 dict unpacking {**d1, **d2} at runtime.
